task:
Continue from Phase 4 completion and begin Phase 5: deploy from workspace @specs/phases/05-deploy-from-workspace.md .

Context:


Repo: nimbus
Current branch with completed Phase 4 work exists (phase-4-agentic-runtime), PR opened.
We want to execute the same workflow as before: spec finalization -> implementation -> tests -> review loop until clean.
Do not ask me preference questions unless absolutely blocked. Make strong defaults and proceed.
Do not commit or push unless I explicitly ask later.
What to do:


Read and finalize specs/phases/05-deploy-from-workspace.md.
Fill gaps with recommended defaults.
Make decisions explicit (API contract, data model, lifecycle states, retries, idempotency, rollback behavior, artifact/provenance links, failure modes, policy gates).
Add concrete request/response schemas and error codes.
Add migration sketch and acceptance criteria.
Implement Phase 5 end-to-end in worker:
DB schema/migrations
API routes + handlers
queue/runtime execution path
events/status model
policy and safety guards
deployment provenance linking back to workspace/task/operation context
Add/expand tests as you build:
unit + integration-style coverage for happy path and failure/rollback/cancel/retry paths.
Run tests continuously and fix issues.
Run review command in a loop:
/review
fix findings
rerun tests
rerun /review
repeat until reviewer reports no blocking bugs.
Stop and wait for me once reviewer is clean.
Constraints:


Full autonomy.
Prefer practical defaults.
Keep implementation aligned with existing patterns from Phases 1–4.
Preserve git/workspace hygiene (don’t revert unrelated user changes).
No commits, no PR creation in this session unless explicitly requested.
Deliverables before stopping:


Updated Phase 5 spec.
Working implementation and tests passing.
Final summary including:
what was implemented,
what bugs were found/fixed during review loop,
current confidence/risk notes,
exact files changed.
Called the Read tool with the following input: {"file
I’m going to be running the review tool myself moving forward. You just fix whatever comes up from the reporter if there’s any items.
